description_long: This is a low-cut, casual lace-up shoe with a predominantly white upper and contrasting deep red accents. The shoe features red laces threaded through five pairs of eyelets and a matching red outsole that wraps slightly up the toe and heel. The upper material appears to be smooth leather or synthetic leather, with visible stitching along the sides and heel for reinforcement. The interior lining is also red, providing a bold contrast to the exterior. The shoe has a rounded toe and a simple, minimalist design with a small stitched detail on the outer side. The overall construction suggests comfort and everyday wear, suitable for urban environments.
description: A white low-cut lace-up shoe with red laces, red outsole, and red interior lining, featuring a minimalist design and visible stitching.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, red laces, and the red outsole wrapping up the front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth white upper, red outsole, and visible stitching along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel, red outsole, and reinforced stitching at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view with a small stitched detail, red laces, and the clean white upper.
